flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at John C Calhoun State Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at John C Calhoun State Community College rose 33% between 2007 and 2010 (8.6% → 11.4%).
